name: [Flow] 内容创作完整工作流 v2.0

parameters.command:
=cat > /tmp/content-{{ $json.content_id }}.md << 'DOCEND'
# {{ $json.title }}

这是生成的文案内容（示例）

DOCEND
cat /tmp/content-{{ $json.content_id }}.md

=bash /home/xx/perfect21/infrastructure/scripts/nas-content-manager.sh create {{ $('2. 生成 Content ID').item.json.content_id }} "{{ $('2. 生成 Content ID').item.json.title }}" {{ $('2. 生成 Content ID').item.json.type }}
echo NAS_CREATED

=bash /home/xx/perfect21/infrastructure/scripts/nas-content-manager.sh update-text {{ $('2. 生成 Content ID').item.json.content_id }} /tmp/content-{{ $('2. 生成 Content ID').item.json.content_id }}.md v1
echo TEXT_UPLOADED

=bash /home/xx/perfect21/infrastructure/scripts/nas-content-manager.sh upload-image {{ $('2. 生成 Content ID').item.json.content_id }} /tmp/card-{{ $('2. 生成 Content ID').item.json.content_id }}.png cover
echo IMAGE_UPLOADED

=bash /home/xx/perfect21/infrastructure/scripts/nas-content-manager.sh update-status {{ $('2. 生成 Content ID').item.json.content_id }} ready
echo STATUS_UPDATED
